candidate_definition_hints.text: FPC is a FAST entropy coder that uses prefix codes (huffman) and has higher compression ratio than many AC or ANS implementations for non-skewed probability distributions.

candidate_glosses.text: FPC is a FAST entropy coder that uses prefix codes (huffman) and has higher compression ratio than many AC or ANS implementations for non-skewed probability distributions.
